zh.lifeSummary: 當Archibald Napier 4th Laird of Merchiston於1449年出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安梅斯頓時，他的父親John Napier 3rd of Merchiston30歲，母親Elizabeth Menteith25歲。他於1479年與Catherine Douglas在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和9個女兒的父母。他去世於1521年在他的家鄉享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Archibald Napier 4th Laird of Merchiston于1449年出生在苏格兰米德洛迪安梅斯頓时，他的父亲John Napier 3rd of Merchiston30岁，母亲Elizabeth Menteith25岁。他于1479年与Catherine Douglas在英国苏格兰艾丁波结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和9个女儿的父母。他去世于1521年在他的家乡享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: Napier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name from Old French napier, nappier, nap(p)er(er) ‘one who looks after the napery or table-linen’, a derivative of Old French nappe ‘table-cloth, napkin’. In Middle English, Napier and Nap(p)er might also have denoted a maker of table cloths, though this sense has not been recorded.

English: alternatively an occupational name from Nap(p)er from an unrecorded Middle English word for one who makes naps, i.e. drinking cups or chalices (Middle English nap, Old English hnæp). Napper could also be a nickname from Middle English nappere ‘one who sleeps or naps’, though this is the least likely of the alternatives.
American shortened form of Polish   Napierala   or a similar name.

variants.name: Napper
meanings: Altered form of English or German   Knapper   or of German   Nepper  .

variants.name: Nappier
meanings: English: variant of   Napier  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Napierala
meanings: Polish (Napierała): nickname for an insistent person,from a derivative of napierać ‘advance, press, urge’.

nameMeanings.name: Archibald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman French origin, from a Germanic (Frankish) personal name derived from ercan ‘genuine’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. It has long been associated with Scotland, where it is in regular use as the English equivalent of Gaelic Gilleasbaig ( see Gillespie ).

variants.name: Archibold
meanings: Of Norman French origin, from a Germanic (Frankish) personal name derived from ercan ‘genuine’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. It has long been associated with Scotland, where it is in regular use as the English equivalent of Gaelic Gilleasbaig ( see Gillespie ).

en.lifeSummary: When Archibald Napier 4th Laird of Merchiston was born in 1449, in Merchiston, Midlothian, Scotland, his father, John Napier 3rd of Merchiston, was 30 and his mother, Elizabeth Menteith, was 25. He married Catherine Douglas in 1479, in Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 9 daughters. He died in 1521, in his hometown, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Archibald Napier 4th Laird of Merchiston est né en 1449, à Merchiston, Midlothian, Écosse, son père, John Napier 3rd of Merchiston, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Menteith, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Douglas en 1479, à Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 9 filles. Il est décédé en 1521, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Archibald Napier 4th Laird of Merchiston 1449 in Merchiston, Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Napier 3rd of Merchiston 30 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Menteith 25. Er hat 1479 in Edinburgh, Schottland, United Kingdom Catherine Douglas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Er starb 1521 im Alter von 72 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Archibald Napier 4th Laird of Merchiston è nato il nel 1449 nel Merchiston, Midlothian, Scotland, il suo padre, John Napier 3rd of Merchiston, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Menteith, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Catherine Douglas nel 1479, nel Edinburgh, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 9 figlie. Morì nel 1521, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Archibald Napier 4th Laird of Merchistonが1449年にスコットランドミドロスアンメルチストンで生まれた時，父John Napier 3rd of Merchistonは30歳，母Elizabeth Menteithは25歳であった。1479年にイギリススコットランドエディンブルグでCatherine Douglasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼は1521年に故郷で72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Archibald Napier 4th Laird of Merchiston(이)가 1449년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 머치스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Napier 3rd of Merchiston(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Menteith(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1479년 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그h에서 Catherine Douglas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1521년 그의 고향에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Archibald Napier 4th Laird of Merchiston nasceu em 1449, em Merchiston, Midlothian, Scotland, seu pai, John Napier 3rd of Merchiston, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Menteith, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine Douglas em 1479, em Edinburgh, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 9 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1521, em sua cidade natal, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Archibald Napier 4th Laird of Merchiston родился в 1449 г. в местности мирчистон, мидлотян, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John Napier 3rd of Merchiston было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Menteith, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Douglas в 1479 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 9 дочерей. Он умер в 1521 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Archibald Napier 4th Laird of Merchiston nació en 1449, en Merchiston, Midlothian, Scotland, su papá, John Napier 3rd of Merchiston, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Menteith, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Catherine Douglas en 1479, en Edinburgh, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió en 1521, en su pueblo, a la edad de 72 años.
